description: Tracked DNB dataset/resource configuration. Changing this file triggers a full DNB refresh and report rebuild.

quarterly_individual_pension_funds.purpose: Quarterly individual pension fund data, including fund-risk quarterly returns.

annual_individual_pension_funds.purpose: Annual individual pension fund data, including TER/cost and flow/participants diagnostics.

public_repository_note: Do not commit a real subscription key. Keep api.subscription_key null and use the DNB_STATPUB_KEY environment variable or GitHub Actions secret.
